_comment: HOW THIS WORKS: 'latest' is the version AVAILABLE to users. The running build is CURRENT_VERSION inside wealthflow-update-system.js. To announce an update: publish new app files AND set 'latest' here to the new number. Users on an older version see the 'Update available' banner. 'type' = full | minor | security. List a version in 'mandatory' to force it.
notes: Critical iOS image-upload crash fixed (memory-safe decode, no crash-loop, auto image-safe recovery) · statement imports auto-mark past payments paid/received · last-6 statement imports can be undone (removes every payment across all tabs) · default Expenses view = grouped timeline (newest first) · App Version now shows live build · professional SVG icons (no boxes)
